headline: AI Engineer specializing in Agentic Systems & Production ML
description: Fourth-year engineering student building production-grade AI systems and autonomous agents. National hackathon winner with hands-on experience deploying LLM-powered applications at scale. I focus on bridging research innovations with real-world deployment challenges.

experience.description: Building production AI agents and LLM-integrated applications. Architecting multi-agent systems with LangGraph and deploying local LLM solutions for enterprise clients with focus on resource optimization and scalability.

Developed AI-powered data analysis pipeline for ERP system processing 100K+ financial records daily. Built production agent handling complex financial queries with 95%+ accuracy, reducing analysis time from hours to minutes and API costs by 60% through intelligent caching.

experience.company: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Kottayam
experience.description: Research on autonomous AI agents using LangChain and local LLMs. Prototyped 7-node agentic workflow architecture achieving 50% reduction in LLM inference calls through optimized pipeline design and resource-conscious GPU management.

Developed official website for national-level techno-cultural festival handling 5000+ participant registrations. Built responsive Next.js platform with real-time event updates, live leaderboards, and maintained 99.9% uptime during peak traffic.
Thrive project intern attending training sessions and working on project activities focused on youth development and community engagement initiatives.
Attended campus leadership summit and facilitated various programs on web development and AI technologies, helping students learn modern development practices and AI fundamentals.
